results.title: 8th Pay Commission: Final fitment factor will be announced by this date! Understand the full math from past trends.
results.description: 8th Pay Commission Salary Hike: The 7th Pay Commission was constituted on February 28, 2014. However, it took approximately 21 months to finalize its recommendations and submit its report, which was presented on November 19, 2015. Similarly, the 8th Pay Commission was constituted on November 3, 2025, and has been given 18 months to submit [...] The post 8th Pay Commission: Final fitment factor will be announced by this date! results.title: There's a vision for 20,000 jobs beside the M62, but not everyone thinks it's a good idea
results.description: First it was the giant Atom Valley development scheme, then a 1,550-home plan foir Bowlee and Simister sparked locals into action
